title: Top Big Data Analytical Tools Ecosystem
description: A flowchart categorizing and connecting the primary types of analytical tools used in Big Data, showing their purpose and relationship to the data pipeline.
relationships: Data is ingested from various sources into storage systems
Processing engines transform and analyze the stored data
Querying tools allow for data interaction and extraction
ML libraries build predictive models on processed data
Real-time tools analyze streaming data as it arrives
Visualization tools present insights for decision-making
